feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Trans Tim Drake (DCU) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Though you hate to undress before my eyes
entry.summary:
Author: selfcest

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,440Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Inside his head, in a deep corner of his brain, he stored those little moments carefully, as if they were achievements. Replaying them over and over whenever he was able to indulge in a bit of solitude. Because it was a quiet reassurance that he was sick. Not sick enough for a real intervention, but it was something. Or, Tim is a mess, and Dick tries, just not hard enough.

entry.title: Terms and Conditions: Love?!
entry.summary:
Author: Tt- Amira_AlGhul (Tt_Dhalia_AlGhul)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,762Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Tim Drake spends his childhood playing the "perfect daughter" of Jack and Janet Drake. Konner Kent-Luthor was raised by Lex Luthor as his temporary "Heir".They're both forced to go to galas frequently. One, changes their lives. Inspired by https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMDYf6R9W/Reddit Post

entry.title: I lost sight in your arms tonight (it was nice)
entry.summary:
Author: Cambatty

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,922Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: “No good thing lasts forever, Boy Wonder,” Steph sighs with a fond look, like his constant mutters of the future weren’t dampening the mood. “That’s why you have to stay when you got it.”   Her arms fold around his chest in the kind of warm embrace only a precious other would offer. “As hard as you try, and I know you do, you can’t control everything, especially the future. Keep your brain on this moment and have some fun while it lasts, yeah?”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Downed Robin is a Dead Robin
entry.summary:
Author: ArixaScribe

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,995Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 267

Summary: Tim was trying to be a good brother...A good brother...A good...------Jason gets hit with a new strain of pollen, Tim goes to check on him and everything goes wrong.

entry.title: Little Sparrow
entry.summary:
Author: ihrt

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,343Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 374

Summary: "Maybe it was better that Tim’s parents were never around, if this is the course of his life. If mother and father weren’t there, they couldn’t see the swell of his belly. If they weren’t here, they wouldn’t see him running to the kitchen sink to empty the casserole from his stomach. He knew when it happened, it only needed to be once and despite how he preferred to dress. How he’d forged his parent's signatures and changed his legal name, it still happened. He’d filled the trash can with tests to check, but only after ignoring it for nearly four months." Tim was gonna not mention it to anyone, was going to find another spot once it was too big to hide, and find a hospital to have his child on his own. His parents, his school mates, and no one would ever know. And then the Wayne's aka the bats got involved.

entry.title: IGIA(UIN) Drafts
entry.summary:
Author: Cheshire1

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,317Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 432

Summary: [This fic is being rewritten!!!] [This is now being used for ideas for the fic] Tim Drake has a venom symbiote that bonded with him when he was just a tiny Timmy. And through a series of coincidences and misunderstandings, everyone thinks he’s a trans kid. Tim, angry and irritated because his Symbiote keeps pestering him for the brains of the goons: “Someone get me chocolate right now, before I kill a bitch.” Jason: “Oh shit, it's Tim's period week again.” Batfam: *Panic* (...It gets worse before it gets better.)

entry.title: o superman, o judge
entry.summary:
Author: slipstream

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,015Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 97

Summary: “Has Robin always been this, uh…” There’s a pause that grows heavier the longer it lingers. “Stoic?” Kon sighs. “I dunno. Maybe? I only ever teamed up with him like, twice before the whole ‘Kidworld’ thing, but that was before Superman came back, so there’s a pretty big gap in between.” “I could be wrong, but…” Bart sounds uncharacteristically hesitant, like each word is being slowly pulled out of him. “I think something might have happened to him. Something bad.”(Five rooftop encounters between the third Robin and a Kryptonian, and one that happens deep underground.)

entry.title: Baby, Both Arms Cradle You Now
entry.summary:
Author: Rosesinyourblood

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,158Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: "What do you need?" Kon asked, very clearly stifling a yawn. "I'm like. Definitely a guy. Figured you'd want to know," and then he hung up. He resumed staring at the ceiling, content to spend the rest of the night this way. Or: 5 times Tim came out to his loved ones and one time he didn't.

entry.title: I'll Cover You
entry.summary:
Author: Lancelot15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,679Chapters: 10/32Kudos: 74

Summary: Tim Drake is Transgender, and he was pretty sure he was completely and utterly alone in that.That is until his friend Kon-El comes out to him during a late night talk.Suddenly, the two find themselves looking out for each other and beginning to care about each other in different ways than before.(I suck at summaries)

entry.title: i can't love you(how you want me to)
entry.summary:
Author: wensbat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,988Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 14

Summary: Going undercover once again as Caroline Hill, she found she couldn’t help but feel a little more comfortable in her own skin when she was dressed and referred to in the way that matched “her disguise”. She still had a long way to go before she’d fully feel like she could be herself openly in this way, but getting a taste of “living as Caroline” made it harder and harder to deny these feelings. Heading back to her safehouse after getting information at the place she works she's stopped by a mugger little do that and Carol know Superboy shows up to put a stop to this. Refusing to leave until he knows that she'll get home safe starts a wonderful night that neither of them want to end.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I see your sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: white_zane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,109Chapters: 7/12Kudos: 35

Summary: Did you ever think about detransitioning simply because you knew that it would kill you faster than any bullet ever could?He never actually said any of that out loud. He didn’t write it down either, afraid to make all of it real, afraid that he wouldn’t be heard anyway even if he put all of it out of there. Because usually he was fine, you know?Tim had never been a girl, but he couldn’t quite be a man either, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t fit into anything.A girl to most, a boy only to those that bothered to listen to him for more than five seconds. Or: Tim has been out as a Transman for some years now, but he feels like he never really got anywhere in his transition. Meanwhile, Damian starts thinking about who he is if he's more than a trained weapon designed to kill people.

entry.title: Rogue Kitten
entry.summary:
Author: scribblebugsstuff

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,780Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Baby Tim's parents left him alone while they go on their longest trip without him yet. This is the story of how the unsupervised chaos child manages to get surprise adopted by the Sirens and the ensuing hijinks and shenanigans This is the first fic I've ever written and it's been rattling around in my brain for months until I spat this out. Enjoy :)

entry.title: Young Justice Can Have a Little Evil As a Treat
entry.summary:
Author: Brownies96

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,256Chapters: 30/35Kudos: 1,504

Summary: Tim snorts, “Right. Obviously, that’s not the full story, but you were in space so we’re good.” He activates the tablet and shows Hal familiar paperwork. “I’ve come to the conclusion that if the League is going to treat me like I’m an unstable rogue, they’re going to have to commit to the bit.”After being treated like unwanted children all their lives, Tim, Kon, Cassie, and Bart start to realise that the adulthood set out before them isn't much better than the past their leaving behind. They decide it's time to make their own way in the world, even if it means being labelled as 'evil'

entry.title: Never settle for someone that doesn't get you "just because" gifts (the disembodied heads of your enemies may apply)
entry.summary:
Author: Squids_Dumb

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,359Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 129

Summary: “Where you headed Hood, this isn't your territory, and since when are you out in daylight?”“I was gonna ask you guys the same thing, isn't this Signals time to be on the rooftops?”“Signal had an exam and Batgirl is supposed to be working a case with B tonight so I asked Robin if he wanted to tag along with me while I cover his shift.”“What are you doing akhi?”Nice of you to ask Damian, I’m trying to blow off some steam because the other half of your second set of parental figures has decided to run off, and even though he said he would be back, the more I think about him leaving, the less sure I am that he was telling the truth. “Just out for a stroll, thought I’d stop by Red Robin’s place and see how he's doing.” Stephanie nods, with a little hum,****Or, Slade has randomly decided to take off on Jason, even going as far as to cut his tracker off. He comes back with a suprise, and in the process Jason learns some new things about what Dick went through while he was gone.

entry.title: Waltz No. 2
entry.summary:
Author: muffin_y

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,757Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

Summary: "Do you want to switch shoes?" "Hm?" Tim tilted his head and stole a sip of her slushee again. It was almost halfway gone, which was disappointing, because it was the biggest size Cass could find. "No, it's okay. I know you hate heels." "And you like them," Cass observed.

entry.title: And That We Call Being
entry.summary:
Author: oldrockformations

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,345Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 487

Summary: “I’m Sorry?” If Tim's… friend (would Tim get shot if he were to call Jason his brother?) is feeling particularly gregarious, they might chat about light subjects—the latest trafficking ring Jason's brought down, the newest security measures government agencies have implemented to try and keep Tim out, whatever shenanigans their assorted siblings and sibling-adjacent friends are getting into. But they've always avoided any conversation topics that might be considered heavier. Namely: feelings. It's been a perfectly normal Tuesday morning so far. They haven't exchanged any words today, other than a dry greeting when Tim sat down half-an-hour ago. There's no way they're about to have this conversation right here, right now. "Do you ever think about being a woman?"   Or Jason comes to terms with the idea that he might be a woman, and realizes how loved she is in the process Or Orjesus christ can u imagine the sociopolitical impacts of the red hood coming out as trans

entry.title: Let's Hear it for the Roy
entry.summary:
Author: Flowerparrish Pods (Flowerparrish)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,569Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: Roy sits down on the tarmac, opens his mouth to take a bite of his sad craft services sandwich, and almost drops it in his lap when New Guy bounces off Natasha, takes immediate damage from her murder stare, and murder stares back. Oh no. He's perfect. Natasha is going to adopt him before Roy can marry him. Roy is going to have Natasha as a mother-in-law. The thought is absolutely terrifying. "Sandwich," Jason whispers in Roy's ear, jabbing an unreasonable elbow into his ribs. "Cut it out!" Roy hisses, conscious of the cameras. "You cut it out." Jason sits down aggressively close, snatching his sandwich and forcing Roy to scoot over or fall over. "Your mooning is getting between me and my lunch."   A lighthearted no capes T4T AU in a completely fictitious lightly Mythbusters-flavored setting.

entry.title: Soothing the Ache
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,377Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 202

Summary: Tim hisses, muscles tensing. Jason freezes, fingers still buried inside of him, and leans back. Tim's face is scrunched, lower lip caught between his teeth. "Did I hurt you?" "N-no," he says, letting out a deep breath. "Not exactly." His cheeks a dusted pink. His eyelids flutter. "I'm just a little… sore." "Sore." He nods. "Inside." Jason blinks. Then laughs. Tim joins him a second later, looking sheepish. Maybe they had overdone last night. Delicately, he pulls his fingers back out. Tim's face scrunches again, but he looks disappointed. "I'm fine, Jay. I still want to-" Jason rolls off of him, laying alongside him. "Maybe we should take it slow."_____Tim is sore. Jason gives him a massage.

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,116Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 166

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.
